response.global_analysis: The audio is a performance of 'Overd' by Hiiragi Kirai. On-screen credits at 03:25 and visual identification confirm the performers are Ichijou Ririka and Takane Lui (contrary to the reference JSON which suggested Todoroki Hajime; Lui's name is explicitly on screen and she introduces herself at 04:12). Tokoyami Towa joins as a guest at 03:50. The reference lyrics match the phonetic delivery. Discarding unused lyrics from the provided JSON and transcribing the subsequent MC dialogue. Timestamps are precisely aligned to vocal starts and ends.

subtitles.original: 四六時中 帰りの会で
subtitles.english: All day long, during the homeroom meeting,

subtitles.original: 面倒くささを押し付けられている
subtitles.english: I'm burdened with all this annoyance.

subtitles.original: 何から何まで 私語は止めて
subtitles.english: From start to finish, stop the private chatter.

subtitles.original: まとめ役なら
subtitles.english: If I'm the one in charge...

subtitles.original: 聞くを上手にうなずきあっている
subtitles.english: I'll nod skillfully while listening.

subtitles.original: なかよしこよしで
subtitles.english: We're like best friends,

subtitles.original: さあ だまれ だまりたまえよ
subtitles.english: so come on, shut up, be quiet.

subtitles.original: 言えないねそんな強い言葉は
subtitles.english: I can't say such strong words.

subtitles.original: 少しだけ静かにしてほしいな
subtitles.english: I want you to be quiet for just a little while.

subtitles.original: ああ 私たち待望へ
subtitles.english: Ah, we are waiting for our future.

subtitles.original: 世界征服 ヤーヤーヤーヤー
subtitles.english: World conquest, ya ya ya ya!

subtitles.original: 果たすすの日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day it's fulfilled.

subtitles.original: 全人類 ヤーヤーヤーヤー
subtitles.english: All of humanity, ya ya ya ya!

subtitles.original: あなたの周りもよいよいよいよい
subtitles.english: Even those around you, yoi yoi yoi yoi!

subtitles.original: 世界征服 アレアレヤー
subtitles.english: World conquest, ale ale ya!

subtitles.original: 約束の地まで
subtitles.english: Until the promised land.

subtitles.original: さあ掲げよ バッテンバッテン
subtitles.english: Now raise them, cross cross!

subtitles.original: 征服 ヤーヤーヤーヤー
subtitles.english: Conquest, ya ya ya ya!

subtitles.original: 今日も議題 そっちのけだね
subtitles.english: Today, you've set the agenda aside again.

subtitles.original: 嫌になるから 私一人でも
subtitles.english: It's annoying, so even if I'm alone,

subtitles.original: やっておきますね
subtitles.english: I'll handle it myself.

subtitles.original: すべて すべて すべて任せて
subtitles.english: Everything, everything, leave it all to me.

subtitles.original: それをさせてよ 大事なことなの
subtitles.english: Let me do it, it's important.

subtitles.original: わかっているでしょう
subtitles.english: You understand, don't you?

subtitles.original: 四六時中 帰りの会で
subtitles.english: All day long, during the homeroom meeting,

subtitles.original: 面倒くさいまま 今日も明日も過ぎて行くのでしょう
subtitles.english: things stay annoying, today and tomorrow will pass like this.

subtitles.original: 花瓶に水をあげましょう
subtitles.english: Let's water the vase.

subtitles.original: 時の中 しおれたこと忘れてた
subtitles.english: In time, I forgot that it had withered.

subtitles.original: さあ だだだだ まれだまりたまえよ
subtitles.english: Come on, shut-sh-sh-shut up, be quiet.

subtitles.original: 言えないねそんな強い言葉は
subtitles.english: I can't say such strong words.

subtitles.original: 少しだけ静かにしてほしいな
subtitles.english: I want you to be quiet for just a little while.

subtitles.original: ああ 私たち待望へ
subtitles.english: Ah, we are waiting for our future.

subtitles.original: 今と未来 見たかったはずなのに
subtitles.english: Even though I should have wanted to see now and the future.

subtitles.original: 世界征服 ヤーヤーヤーヤー
subtitles.english: World conquest, ya ya ya ya!

subtitles.original: 見えるその日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day I can see it.

subtitles.original: 三千世界 ヤーヤーヤーヤー
subtitles.english: In all creation, ya ya ya ya!

subtitles.original: これの理 よいよいよいよい
subtitles.english: This is the way, yoi yoi yoi yoi!

subtitles.original: 今は征服 さあさあさあさあ
subtitles.english: Now conquest, come on, come on, come on!

subtitles.original: あなたの街中
subtitles.english: Right in your town.

subtitles.original: カタチヅクルわ バッテンさあ
subtitles.english: I'll shape it with a cross.

subtitles.original: 世界征服 ヤーヤーヤーヤー
subtitles.english: World conquest, ya ya ya ya!

subtitles.original: 果たすすの日まで
subtitles.english: Until the day it's fulfilled.

subtitles.original: 全人類 ヤーヤーヤーヤー
subtitles.english: All of humanity, ya ya ya ya!

subtitles.original: あなたの周りもよいよいよいよい
subtitles.english: Even those around you, yoi yoi yoi yoi!

subtitles.original: 世界征服 アレアレヤー
subtitles.english: World conquest, ale ale ya!

subtitles.original: 約束の地まで
subtitles.english: Until the promised land.

subtitles.original: さあ掲げよ バッテンバッテン
subtitles.english: Now raise them, cross cross!

subtitles.original: 征服したら ビンテージのワインを
subtitles.english: Once conquered, let's open

subtitles.original: 空けましょう
subtitles.english: a bottle of vintage wine.

subtitles.original: おつめろー！ イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Good job everyone! Yay!

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、引き続きゲストパートお送りしておりましたが…
subtitles.english: Yes! So, we've been bringing you the guest part...

subtitles.original: なんと、もう一人MCに呼びたいと思います！
subtitles.english: and I'd like to call one more person to the MC!

subtitles.original: 誰だ、誰だ、誰だ？
subtitles.english: Who is it, who is it, who is it?

subtitles.original: トワ先輩！ ハイ！ハイ！トワ様！ハイ！
subtitles.english: Towa-senpai! Yes! Yes! Towa-sama! Yes!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ 来ていただいてありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Yay! Thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: いや、こちらこそ！
subtitles.english: No, thank you!

subtitles.original: ちょっとせっかくなんで自己紹介していただいてもいいですか？
subtitles.english: Since you're here, could you introduce yourself?

subtitles.original: はい！オッケー！ホロライブ4期生の、あれ…？
subtitles.english: Yes! Okay! Of Hololive 4th Gen, wait...?

subtitles.original: 常闇トワです！ あれ、何だっけ？
subtitles.english: I'm Tokoyami Towa! Wait, what was it again?

subtitles.original: こんやっぴーがないから言えないんだ。こんやっぴー！
subtitles.english: I can't say it without 'Konyappi'. Konyappi~!

subtitles.original: はい、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Yes, go ahead!

subtitles.original: はい、皆さん待たかね？
subtitles.english: Yes, did everyone wait?

subtitles.original: HoloXの女幹部、鷹嶺ルイと申します！
subtitles.english: I am the HoloX female executive, Takane Lui!

subtitles.original: リリカ、お誕生日おめでとう！ おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Ririka, happy birthday! Happy birthday!

subtitles.original: めっちゃ嬉しい！ 喜びの舞。
subtitles.english: I'm so happy! A dance of joy.

subtitles.original: いや、呼んでくれて嬉しいよ、お誕生日にさ。
subtitles.english: I'm really happy you invited me for your birthday.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！ もうルイ姉もトワ先輩も、
subtitles.english: Thank you! Both Lui-nee and Towa-senpai...

subtitles.original: もう凄くリリカに優しくしてくれる、リリカ的には姉御的な存在なので。
subtitles.english: are so kind to me. To me, they're like big sisters.

subtitles.original: まあまあまあ、慕ってくれて、慕ってくれて。 あ、そこは謙遜しないんだね。
subtitles.english: Well, well, keep looking up to me. Oh, you're not humble about it.

subtitles.original: 前もな、前もトワのこと慕ったよな。 ああ、トワ、トワ、トワ。
subtitles.english: Before, too, you looked up to Towa, didn't you? Ah, Towa, Towa, Towa.

subtitles.original: 本当に嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'm truly happy!

subtitles.original: やばい、このキラキラについていけない！ キラキラキラキラ…
subtitles.english: Gosh, I can't keep up with this sparkles! Sparkle, sparkle...
